description: MO DHSS: General operating rooms minimum 360 sq ft net clear floor area per FGI 2022 as adopted by Missouri.
citation: 19 CSR 30-20.021 / Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services

description: MO DHSS: Single-bed patient room minimum 120 sq ft clear; two-bed rooms minimum 100 sq ft per patient.
MO DHSS: ICU cubicle minimum 150 sq ft clear; open-bay ICU minimum 120 sq ft per patient.
MO DHSS: Emergency treatment rooms minimum 120 sq ft per treatment space.
MO DHSS: Patient care corridors minimum 8 ft clear width.
MO DHSS: Surgical suites 20 ACH total, 4 ACH outside air, positive pressure, HEPA-filtered.
MO DHSS: Certificate of Need required for new hospital beds and capital expenditures above state threshold. Missouri CON administered by DHSS Certificate of Need Program.
citation: RSMo §197.300 — Missouri Certificate of Need Law
